sourceMovie.title: Equus
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Equus (1977) as a drama theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The drama and mystery blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Remember
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Equus clicked for you, Remember (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and mystery, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Equus clicked for you, The Good Doctor (2011) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and mystery, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Equus?
faq.answer: Try Remember, The Good Doctor, Twelve Monkeys—each shares DNA with Equus while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Equus?
faq.answer: Equus (1977) is best described as Drama, Mystery, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Equus worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
